info.name: TSP - EMVCo Comprehensive Test Cases
info.description: Comprehensive EMVCo-compliant test cases for TSP TakaPay Token Vault covering: [A] Token Provisioning, [B] Account Range Validation, [C] Quarter BIN Range Setup, [D] Token Lifecycle, [E] Token Expiry Validation, [F] De-Tokenization, [G] Token Domain Restriction, [H] Security & Fraud Controls, [I] Boundary & Capacity Tests, [J] Error Handling & Response Codes. Generated per EMVCo Payment Tokenization Specification v2.2+.

item.name: TC-A Token Provisioning
TC-TVT-001 Token Provisioning - Valid PAN in Q1 range

request.description: POSITIVE: Provision a token for a valid PAN with Q1 expiry (Mar 2027). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3. Business Rule: R1, R4. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token (13-19 digit Luhn-valid), TAL returned, token expiry within PAN expiry boundary.

item.name: TC-TVT-002 Token Provisioning - Valid PAN in Q2 range

request.description: POSITIVE: Provision token with Q2 expiry (Jun 2027). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token issued from Q2 BIN range.

item.name: TC-TVT-003 Token Provisioning - Valid PAN in Q3 range

request.description: POSITIVE: Provision token with Q3 expiry (Sep 2027). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token from Q3 BIN range.

item.name: TC-TVT-004 Token Provisioning - Valid PAN in Q4 range

request.description: POSITIVE: Provision token with Q4 expiry (Dec 2027). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token from Q4 BIN range.

item.name: TC-TVT-005 Token Provisioning - BIN range boundary first token

request.description: BOUNDARY: First token at BIN_START of quarter range. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.2. Business Rule: R2. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token value starts at configured BIN_START.

item.name: TC-TVT-006 Token Provisioning - BIN range boundary last token

request.description: BOUNDARY: Last token at BIN_END of quarter range (capacity-1 already allocated). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.2. Business Rule: R2, R3. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token at BIN_END.

item.name: TC-TVT-007 Token Provisioning - Range one away from exhaustion

request.description: BOUNDARY: Quarter range has exactly 1 token remaining. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.2. Business Rule: R3, R5. Expected: HTTP 200/201, last token issued, remaining capacity = 0 after.

item.name: TC-TVT-008 Token Provisioning - Range fully exhausted

request.description: NEGATIVE: Quarter BIN range fully exhausted (allocated = capacity). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.2. Business Rule: R3. Expected: HTTP 422, error: TOKEN_RANGE_EXHAUSTED.

item.name: TC-TVT-009 Token Provisioning - PAN outside account range

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN suffix below configured account range lower limit. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.2. Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 422, error: ACCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE.

item.name: TC-TVT-010 Token Provisioning - Expired PAN

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN expiry 01/2023 is in the past. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.1. Expected: HTTP 400, error: PAN expired, cannot issue token.

item.name: TC-TVT-011 Token Provisioning - Quarter not configured

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN expiry maps to Q4 2028 but no token range configured for that quarter/year. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 422, error: EXPIRY_QUARTER_MISMATCH or no range configured.

item.name: TC-TVT-012 Token Provisioning - Re-tokenize same PAN (idempotency)

request.description: FUNCTIONAL: Same PAN + same Token Requestor ID + same domain. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.4. Expected: HTTP 200, same token returned (idempotent), no new token allocated.

item.name: TC-TVT-013 Token Provisioning - Invalid PAN format (non-numeric)

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN contains non-numeric characters. EMVCo Ref: Section 3.1. Expected: HTTP 400, invalid PAN format.

item.name: TC-TVT-014 Token Provisioning - PAN too short (12 digits)

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN length 12 digits (min 13 per EMVCo). EMVCo Ref: Section 3.1. Expected: HTTP 400, PAN length invalid.

item.name: TC-TVT-015 Token Provisioning - PAN too long (20 digits)

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN length 20 digits (max 19 per EMVCo). EMVCo Ref: Section 3.1. Expected: HTTP 400, PAN length invalid.

item.name: TC-B Account Range Validation
TC-TVT-016 Account Range - PAN within valid range

request.description: POSITIVE: PAN suffix 5000000 within range [1100000-9000000]. Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 200/201, token issued.

item.name: TC-TVT-017 Account Range - PAN at lower boundary

request.description: BOUNDARY: PAN suffix exactly at panLowerLimit (1100000). Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 200/201, accepted (inclusive boundary).

item.name: TC-TVT-018 Account Range - PAN at upper boundary

request.description: BOUNDARY: PAN suffix exactly at panUpperLimit (9000000). Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 200/201, accepted (inclusive boundary).

item.name: TC-TVT-019 Account Range - PAN below lower limit

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN suffix 0000001 below panLowerLimit 1100000. Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 422, error: ACCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE.

item.name: TC-TVT-020 Account Range - PAN above upper limit

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN suffix 9999999 above panUpperLimit 9000000. Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 422, error: ACCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE.

item.name: TC-TVT-021 Account Range - PAN in deactivated range

request.description: NEGATIVE: Account range has been deactivated. Business Rule: R1. Precondition: Deactivate the account range first. Expected: HTTP 422, error: ACCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE.

item.name: TC-C Quarter BIN Range Setup
TC-TVT-022 BIN Range - Configure non-overlapping Q4 range

request.description: POSITIVE: New non-overlapping BIN range for Q4 2027. Business Rule: R2, R6. Expected: HTTP 200/201, range created with capacity metadata.

item.name: TC-TVT-023 BIN Range - Overlapping range rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: Range [9200000-9800000] overlaps existing Q2 range [9100000-9999999]. Business Rule: R6. Expected: HTTP 409, error: BIN_RANGE_OVERLAP_DETECTED.

item.name: TC-TVT-024 BIN Range - Already-configured quarter

request.description: NEGATIVE: Q2 2027 already has a configured range. Business Rule: R2. Expected: HTTP 409, error: quarter already configured or BIN_RANGE_OVERLAP_DETECTED.

item.name: TC-TVT-025 BIN Range - Start > End rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: lowerLimit > upperLimit. Business Rule: R2. Expected: HTTP 400, invalid range: start > end.

item.name: TC-TVT-026 BIN Range - Zero capacity rejected

request.description: BOUNDARY: lowerLimit == upperLimit (capacity=1 or 0). Business Rule: R2. Expected: HTTP 400, zero or insufficient capacity.

item.name: TC-TVT-027 BIN Range - Retrieve config per quarter

request.description: POSITIVE: Retrieve BIN range config. Business Rule: R2. Expected: HTTP 200, response includes quarter, year, capacity, allocatedCount, remainingCount per range.

item.name: TC-D Token Lifecycle
TC-TVT-028 Lifecycle - Activate token (INACTIVE -> ACTIVE)

request.description: POSITIVE: Activate a provisioned (INACTIVE) token. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.1. Expected: HTTP 200, status changes to ACTIVE.

item.name: TC-TVT-029 Lifecycle - Suspend token (ACTIVE -> SUSPENDED)

request.description: POSITIVE: Suspend an active token. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.2. Expected: HTTP 200, status changes to SUSPENDED.

item.name: TC-TVT-030 Lifecycle - Resume token (SUSPENDED -> ACTIVE)

request.description: POSITIVE: Resume a suspended token. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.3. Expected: HTTP 200, status changes back to ACTIVE.

item.name: TC-TVT-031 Lifecycle - Delete token (any state -> DELETED)

request.description: POSITIVE: Delete a token from any state. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.4. Expected: HTTP 200, status changes to DELETED, token cannot be used.

item.name: TC-TVT-032 Lifecycle - Transaction on SUSPENDED token rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: Attempt payment authorization with SUSPENDED token. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.5. Expected: HTTP 403, error: token is suspended.

item.name: TC-TVT-033 Lifecycle - Transaction on DELETED token rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: Attempt payment authorization with DELETED token. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.5. Expected: HTTP 403, error: token is deleted.

item.name: TC-TVT-034 Lifecycle - Invalid state transition (INACTIVE -> SUSPENDED)

request.description: NEGATIVE: Cannot suspend a token that is still INACTIVE. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.2. Expected: HTTP 400, invalid state transition.

item.name: TC-TVT-035 Lifecycle - Delete already deleted token

request.description: NEGATIVE: Attempt to delete an already deleted token. EMVCo Ref: Section 6.4. Expected: HTTP 404 or 409, token already deleted.

item.name: TC-E Token Expiry Validation
TC-TVT-036 Expiry - Token expiry within PAN expiry

request.description: POSITIVE: PAN expiry Jun 2028, token assigned to Q2 2028 range. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.4. Expected: HTTP 200, token expiry <= PAN expiry.

item.name: TC-TVT-037 Expiry - Token expiry beyond PAN expiry rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: Forced token expiry (Jun 2027) beyond PAN expiry (Jan 2027). EMVCo Ref: Section 4.4. Expected: HTTP 400, EMVCo violation: token expiry cannot exceed PAN expiry.

item.name: TC-TVT-038 Expiry - Provision for already expired PAN

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN expiry Jan 2024 is already past. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.4. Expected: HTTP 400, cannot tokenize expired PAN.

item.name: TC-TVT-039 Expiry - Quarter matches PAN expiry correctly

request.description: POSITIVE: PAN expiry Aug 2027 maps to Q3. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 200, token issued from Q3 2027 BIN range.

item.name: TC-TVT-040 Expiry - Quarter mismatch error

request.description: NEGATIVE: PAN expiry Dec 2027 maps to Q4 but Q4 2027 range not configured. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 422, error: EXPIRY_QUARTER_MISMATCH.

item.name: TC-F De-Tokenization
TC-TVT-041 De-tokenize - Authorized party valid active token

request.description: POSITIVE: Authorized party de-tokenizes an active token. EMVCo Ref: Section 5.1. Expected: HTTP 200, original PAN returned.

item.name: TC-TVT-042 De-tokenize - Unauthorized party rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: Unauthorized party attempts de-tokenization. EMVCo Ref: Section 5.2. Expected: HTTP 403, de-tokenization not permitted.

item.name: TC-TVT-043 De-tokenize - Deleted token rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: De-tokenize a deleted token. EMVCo Ref: Section 5.3. Expected: HTTP 404 or 422, token not found or deleted.

item.name: TC-TVT-044 De-tokenize - Invalid token format (non-Luhn)

request.description: NEGATIVE: Token value fails Luhn check. EMVCo Ref: Section 3.2. Expected: HTTP 400, error: INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT.

item.name: TC-TVT-045 De-tokenize - Tampered token value

request.description: NEGATIVE: Token value does not exist in vault. EMVCo Ref: Section 5.4. Expected: HTTP 404, token not found in vault.

item.name: TC-G Token Domain Restriction Control
TC-TVT-046 TDRC - Token used within allowed domain

request.description: POSITIVE: Token with ECOMMERCE domain used for e-commerce transaction. EMVCo Ref: Section 7.1. Expected: HTTP 200, authorization approved.

item.name: TC-TVT-047 TDRC - Token used outside allowed domain rejected

request.description: NEGATIVE: Token restricted to ECOMMERCE used for CONTACTLESS. EMVCo Ref: Section 7.2. Expected: HTTP 403, error: TOKEN_DOMAIN_VIOLATION.

item.name: TC-TVT-048 TDRC - Token with no domain restriction

request.description: POSITIVE: Token with no domain restriction used in any domain. EMVCo Ref: Section 7.3. Expected: HTTP 200, authorization approved.

item.name: TC-TVT-049 TDRC - Domain updated mid-lifecycle

request.description: POSITIVE: Update domain restriction on an active token. EMVCo Ref: Section 7.4. Expected: HTTP 200, new restriction enforced on subsequent transactions.

item.name: TC-H Security and Fraud Controls
TC-TVT-050 Security - Duplicate token request idempotent

request.description: FUNCTIONAL: Duplicate request with same idempotencyKey. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.3.4. Expected: HTTP 200, same token returned, no new allocation.

item.name: TC-TVT-051 Security - Brute-force token enumeration rate limited

request.description: SECURITY: Rapidly send 100+ de-tokenization attempts with random token values. EMVCo Ref: Section 8.1. Expected: HTTP 429 after threshold, rate limiting enforced.

item.name: TC-TVT-052 Security - Manipulated Luhn check rejected

request.description: SECURITY: Token with bad Luhn check digit. EMVCo Ref: Section 3.2. Expected: HTTP 400, error: INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT.

item.name: TC-TVT-053 Security - Expired JWT/OAuth in header

request.description: SECURITY: Expired JWT token in Authorization header. Expected: HTTP 401, unauthorized.

item.name: TC-TVT-054 Security - Missing authorization header

request.description: SECURITY: No Authorization header and no X-TV-ID. Expected: HTTP 401, missing credentials.

item.name: TC-TVT-055 Security - SQL injection in PAN field

request.description: SECURITY: SQL injection attempt in PAN field. Expected: HTTP 400, input sanitized and rejected, no DB impact.

item.name: TC-TVT-056 Security - Token Assurance Level returned

request.description: FUNCTIONAL: TAL correctly calculated based on ID&V method. EMVCo Ref: Section 4.5. Expected: HTTP 200, tokenAssuranceLevel field present with appropriate level.

item.name: TC-I Boundary and Capacity Tests
TC-TVT-057 Boundary - First token of quarter range

request.description: BOUNDARY: First-ever token issuance from a fresh Q2 range. Business Rule: R2. Expected: HTTP 200, token at BIN_START, remaining = capacity - 1.

item.name: TC-TVT-058 Boundary - Last token of quarter range

request.description: BOUNDARY: Last token when allocated = capacity - 1. Business Rule: R3. Expected: HTTP 200, token at BIN_END, remaining = 0 after.

item.name: TC-TVT-059 Boundary - Allocated = capacity (exhausted)

request.description: NEGATIVE: Request when allocated = capacity. Business Rule: R3. Expected: HTTP 422, error: TOKEN_RANGE_EXHAUSTED.

item.name: TC-TVT-060 Boundary - Concurrent requests at range boundary

request.description: PERFORMANCE: Send 10 concurrent provision requests when only 5 tokens remain. Business Rule: R3. Expected: Exactly 5 succeed, 5 return TOKEN_RANGE_EXHAUSTED. No over-allocation.

item.name: TC-TVT-061 Boundary - Remaining capacity decrements correctly

request.description: FUNCTIONAL: After issuing N tokens, verify remainingCount = capacity - N. Business Rule: R5. Expected: HTTP 200, remainingCount field accurately reflects allocation.

item.name: TC-TVT-062 Boundary - Partial utilization does not block future issuance

request.description: POSITIVE: Quarter range partially used (e.g., 50%). Business Rule: R5. Expected: HTTP 200, token issued successfully from remaining capacity.

item.name: TC-J Error Handling and Response Codes
TC-TVT-063 Error - ACCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE

request.description: NEGATIVE: Validate error code ACCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE and response structure. Business Rule: R1. Expected: HTTP 422, body contains errorCode, errorMessage, traceId, timestamp.

item.name: TC-TVT-064 Error - TOKEN_RANGE_EXHAUSTED

request.description: NEGATIVE: Validate error code TOKEN_RANGE_EXHAUSTED. Business Rule: R3. Precondition: Exhaust the Q2 range. Expected: HTTP 422, body contains errorCode, errorMessage, traceId, timestamp.

item.name: TC-TVT-065 Error - EXPIRY_QUARTER_MISMATCH

request.description: NEGATIVE: Validate error code EXPIRY_QUARTER_MISMATCH. Business Rule: R4. Expected: HTTP 422, body contains errorCode, errorMessage, traceId, timestamp.

item.name: TC-TVT-066 Error - BIN_RANGE_OVERLAP_DETECTED

request.description: NEGATIVE: Validate error code BIN_RANGE_OVERLAP_DETECTED. Business Rule: R6. Expected: HTTP 409, body contains errorCode, errorMessage, traceId, timestamp.

item.name: TC-TVT-067 Error - INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT

request.description: NEGATIVE: Validate error code INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT. EMVCo Ref: Section 3.2. Expected: HTTP 400, body contains errorCode, errorMessage, traceId, timestamp.

item.name: TC-TVT-068 Error - TOKEN_DOMAIN_VIOLATION

request.description: NEGATIVE: Validate error code TOKEN_DOMAIN_VIOLATION. EMVCo Ref: Section 7.2. Expected: HTTP 403, body contains errorCode, errorMessage, traceId, timestamp.

item.name: TC-TVT-069 Error - Response structure validation

request.description: NEGATIVE: Empty required fields. Expected: HTTP 400, response body MUST contain: errorCode (string), errorMessage (string), traceId (UUID), timestamp (ISO-8601).
